expectations.evidence: The script creates a mock AgUiClient class that emits plain JSON payloads, not the actual SDK event classes

expectations.text: Uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::TextMessageStartEvent, TextMessageContentEvent, and TextMessageEndEvent with matching message_id
expectations.evidence: Uses custom JSON payload format, not SDK event classes
Uses finish_run method with custom payload, not the SDK event class

expectations.text: Uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events and writes them to a stream
expectations.evidence: Uses puts to print JSON, not EventEncoder
